headline: The Bull Case For Emerson Electric (EMR) Could Change Following Jefferies’ Backlog-Driven Upgrade - Learn Why
summary: In late March 2026, Jefferies upgraded Emerson Electric from Hold to Buy, citing strong order momentum, a roughly US$7.90 billion backlog, and solid free cash flow guidance reinforced by CEO Lal Karsanbhai’s comments on demand strength in North America, India, and the Middle East & Africa. This combination of analyst conviction and management’s emphasis on automation demand and backlog visibility highlights how Emerson’s automation-focused model may underpin its shareholder return...
